Document:
# Faction War
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Faction%20War"/]
◈ Faction War ◈ Declaration & Engagement System ◈
The [bold]Faction War[/bold] system allows eligible factions to formally declare war on each other during a round. Wars are structured - they have a lead-up, a duration, and an end. They are not free-for-all deathmatches. They are organized conflicts with rules, commands, and consequences.
## War-Capable Factions
Only the following factions may declare or receive war declarations:
[bold]Note:[/bold] Rangers are aliased to NCR - a war declaration against NCR includes Rangers automatically.
## Timeline
[bold]Phase[/bold] [bold]Duration[/bold] [bold]Description[/bold] Round-Start Cooldown [bold]30 minutes[/bold] War declarations are locked for the first 30 minutes of every round. This gives factions time to set up, staff their positions, and establish themselves before conflict begins. [bold]Pending Phase[/bold] [bold]5 minutes[/bold] After a war is declared, both sides have a 5-minute preparation window. During this phase, members of either faction may use [bold]/warjoin[/bold] to opt into the conflict. Once the pending phase ends, the war goes active. [bold]Active War[/bold] [bold]30 minutes[/bold] Combat is authorized between the warring factions. The war runs for a maximum of 30 minutes before an automatic ceasefire is triggered. [bold]Post-War Cooldown[/bold] [bold]10 minutes[/bold] After a war ends (by ceasefire or timeout), both factions enter a 10-minute cooldown before they can declare war on anyone again.
## Commands
[bold]Command[/bold] [bold]Description[/bold] [bold]Who Can Use It[/bold] /war Declare war on another faction. The reason ([italic]casus belli[/italic]) must be at least [bold]5 words[/bold] long. Highest-ranking online member of the declaring faction /warjoin Join a pending war during the 5-minute preparation phase. Any member of an involved faction /ceasefire End an active war early by mutual agreement. Highest-ranking online member only
[bold]Command[/bold] [bold]Description[/bold] /warend Force-end a war between two factions. /forcewar [reason] Force-start a war, bypassing cooldowns and rank requirements.
## Rules
[bold]One war per faction at a time[/bold] - a faction cannot be involved in two simultaneous wars.
[bold]Only the highest-ranking online member[/bold] may declare war or issue a ceasefire. Rank is determined by job weight.
[bold]Casus belli is mandatory[/bold] - you must state a reason for war, and it must be at least 5 words.
[bold]Auto-ceasefire[/bold] triggers after 30 minutes of active combat regardless of the battlefield situation.
Wars are [bold]broadcast server-wide[/bold] - all players see war declarations, pending phases, and ceasefires.
